Think of TikTok's Agency Guidebook as your encyclopedia to getting your clients going and growing on TikTok. Have a question you need answered? Now you can check out the table of contents and go directly to the section of the topic you're curious about rather than flipping through an entire deck. # The ease of Autopay

Automatic Payment (Autopay) is our recommended form of payment for Agencies after setting up your Business Center. Why? Check out its benefits:

1 Charges your accounts automatically and reduces unnecessary campaign pause

# Lead Generation best practices

Keep these best practices in mind when setting up and optimizing your clients’ Lead Generation campaigns.

# Targeting Client Customers

Use Broad Targeting. Keep targeting as broad as possible for your Prospecting Lead Generation campaigns to maximize addressable audience size and drive greater efficiency.

Use Lookalike Audiences. Reach audiences that share commonalities with your clients’ ideal customers with Lookalike Audiences.

# Bidding and Budgeting

Set budget at a minimum of 10x the expected CPA. As you’re getting started, use a Lowest Cost bidding strategy with a daily budget set at a minimum 10x your client’s expected CPL.

To best scale spend, increase budget at a maximum of 50% per day. If you're looking to increase budget by more than that, increase budget over the course of a few days.

Optimize total spend with Campaign Budget Optimization. If you're working with multiple ad groups in a campaign, we recommend using Campaign Budget Optimization to easily and automatically optimize overall spend.

# Data Connections

Integrate your client’s CRM with TikTok so you can seamlessly and efficiently manage leads from their Lead Generation campaigns. This ensures the highest rate of contactability possible and streamlines efforts for sales teams.

# Form Best Practices

# 1\. Visuals help!

Add a logo, header image, and footer image to showcase your business and products / services more effectively to users

2. Be conscious of number of questions If you’re looking to generate more lead volume, set a maximum of 6 questions

3. Use logic settings and custom questions With the advanced form, use logic settings to switch up questions based on how someone responded to the first question.

4. Link to your privacy policy


Link to your privacy policy in your form to guarantee that any personal information is collected is secure and in accordance with local laws.

5. Include a review screen This will help with higher intent

6. Don’t forget to say ‘thank you’! including a thank you message and specifying what the next steps are and how/when you'll get back to the user

Build audiences for retargeting and drive users down the funnel.

# Step 1: Confirm Website

To use the TikTok Pixel, you’ll need to have a website and the ability to edit the website’s code / theme.

# Step 3: Install Pixel

Turn on the Automatic Advanced Matching and First Party Cookies toggle and install Pixel. You can do this manually or via 3rd party. For manual installation, refer to this guide.

# Step 5: Create Events

Now that your client’s Pixel is setup correctly, set up at least 3 events: View Content, Add to Cart, and Complete Payment. We recommend using Event Builder to do so for advertisers with limited developer resources.

# Start the Campaign

![](https://ads.tiktok.com/business/library/images/728ff78bc47afcce5e6f25ee1a6b457e2e725c9513159631576b647ef2577dd4.jpg)

# Pixel Setup

Pro Tip: We recommend using one Pixel code per website, so if you already have a Pixel code on your website, you can skip steps 1 - 3

# Step 2: Create Pixel

Sign into your TikTok business account and go to Ads Manager > Assets > Events to create your Pixel.

Here, you’ll need to select whether you’ll manually install the code and whether you’ll use the TikTok Event Builder to set up web events.

# Step 4: Verify installation with TikTok Pixel Helper

Download the TikTok Pixel Helper chrome extension to verify your Pixel is setup correctly.

See here for more info on the TikTok Pixel Helper.

Set up Pixel with a click if your client uses a TikTok E-Commerce Partner Platform like Shopify, Ecwid, BigCommerce, and more!

![](https://ads.tiktok.com/business/library/images/c3a3547a4c619cb4b23232639412025829718f525f5b89e518d5f265f8cf2872.jpg)

Now that Pixel is in place, it’s time to set up the campaign in TikTok Ads Manager!

![](https://ads.tiktok.com/business/library/images/64761847f5a98c62a7c83756b886fa6ad0cf614bd1755a4a055330eb1b9039c2.jpg)

Start setting up their first campaign by clicking on "Create an ad" on your dashboard and follow these simple steps at the Campaign Level:

# Campaign Level

1. Select the “Website conversions” objective
2. Turn off "Set Campaign Budget” (you’ll use daily ad group budgets for more control)

# Setting up the Ad Group Level

Pro tip: Daily Ad Group Budget

Daily Ad Group Budget is the maximum amount you will allow your client's ad group to spend per day.

Need some budget recommendations? We’ve got you.

Complete Payment/Shopping Optimization Event $100 NA, $50 EMEA and APAC, $20 LATAM (median budgets to get 10+ conversions)

Non-shopping Optimization Event $40 NA, $30 EMEA and APAC, $10 LATAM

These amount gives the algorithm enough to learn who your client's ideal audience is and get optimal results early.

![](https://ads.tiktok.com/business/library/images/f7d782efe51824e05d3481c9d38e4dc405da47f952891d3eeb62cb0362889c5b.jpg)

Next up is the Ad Group Level. At the ad group level, you can define placements, creative type, target audience, budget & schedule, and bidding method & optimization.

# Ad Group

1. Select “Website” and your Pixel
2. Choose “Add to Cart” as your Optimization Event.
3. Choose “TikTok” under “Select Placement”

   4 Choose their Targeting. We recommend "Automatic Targeting." If you do use "Custom Targeting" keep your client's audience broad using the Audience Size Estimator.
4. Set a daily ad group budget (start with at least $30USD)

Setting up the Ad Level and going live!

![](https://ads.tiktok.com/business/library/images/ddf9548b3354b80e31e581989771143fa57005cdbb56ddc9bc64fcf7e5b45438.jpg)

Ads are the content that you ultimately present to the target audience and what they will see on their mobile apps.

# Ad Level

1. Upload the new video you’ve created for your client
2. Fill in the ad's Text and URL.
3. Select Dynamic for "Call to action”
4. Click submit to send their first campaign for review!

# Have questions about these set up steps? We’ve got answers.

# Q: What happens after we submit or client’s ad campaign?

Q: At the Ad Level, why do we fill in both the Text and URL?

# Q: At the Ad Level, why do we fill in both the Text and URL?

Q: At the Ad Group Level, why should we choose “Add to Cart” as the Optimization Event?

This is what your client’s ad will say and link to on TikTok.

This is what your client’s ad will say and link to on TikTok.

Our research shows starting with Add to Cart events helps the system learn what

types of visitors

convert. See the

‘Nurture your first

campaign’ section

below for when we

recommend moving to Complete

Payment.

All ads go through a review process after you click “Submit” to ensure all paid promoted content is both safe and engaging for our community.

You will receive a notification once your client's ads have been approved and published–most ads are reviewed within 24 hours.

# What do I do after setting up our client’s first conversion campaign?

After you set up your client’s web conversion campaign, it’s important to monitor how many Add to Cart

conversions your client gets in week 1.

Here’s your plan of action if they get at least one conversion vs none at all.

![](https://ads.tiktok.com/business/library/images/d21a831d62c8d3719caa0ca3b740e7ebd8596c568602705e308e530edc46a2cd.jpg)

Pro tip: Keep the Add to Cart ad group on to drive continuous conversion volume and let the system learn!

# Bears with Benefits

Bears with Benefits – a vitamins and supplements range designed for women's health and beauty – was hungry to reach a new audience in Italy, and its key focus was on sales. By using Spark Ads, Bears with Benefits was able show its authentic side by promoting its organic posts. Furthermore, it used Video Shopping Ads so viewers could shop the products within TikTok. They also used Advanced Matching for Web to better measure and match conversions on its website to people on TikTok, boost campaigns, and expand its reach. Lastly, Bears with Benefits combined its low-cost approach with Automatic Targeting to help the in-house team optimise their budget by pinpointing the audiences most likely to convert.

Their’ smart approach to its ads, resulted in a far higher ROAS, and a reduction in its CPM, for product sales. In other words, it sold more for less

![](https://ads.tiktok.com/business/library/images/030215cba8a6f209cd43d9edfb2a5ffd60e1a1411c54465b747dc44bd5a84177.jpg)

![](https://ads.tiktok.com/business/library/images/406880ae4862e29269acf320921dcd73bcf8aff3f2a2b4f3828c0863c514d562.jpg)

You’ve set up your client’s first web ads conversion campaign. Congratulations! Now let’s keep that momentum going by leveling up. This section is especially important for ecommerce/retail clients as it’s all about selling products directly from TikTok with our shopping products.

web.markdown:
# How to make your CPG launch unmissable on TikTok

![](https://ads.tiktok.com/business/library/images/ed91be8df8a7322575fbde5dcd3caf39b5e9e24e02936a398385049df67747a2.jpg)

Breaking through unlimited consumer choice and content requires consumer centric messaging within a community-based context to truly connect. Drive quality engagement on TikTok by placing your launch where culture is being facilitated and watched.

# Weʼve got the communities and connections for your launch

![](https://ads.tiktok.com/business/library/images/f26e46a09759340bbb7976cc45a4c71df8adf0a0d4bf5033a496821e8dd10200.jpg)

![](https://ads.tiktok.com/business/library/images/5c081eef119365485c02f2d54e42f8bd7c7e8454b8d7c4da6566432ec782f802.jpg)

# TikTok is the new eye-level

Securing placement in a maximum attention zone for the highest chances of discovery to cart is vital. In stores, that is eye level shelves. In the digital world, itʼs TikTok. Youʼre reaching people at scale who are willing to try you and buy you.

![](https://ads.tiktok.com/business/library/images/266daebb782140022f03cd8c9edd3037b4679b972cd83597bf4ce8f56ff4dc28.jpg)

# TikTok outperforms all other digital platform for product discovery – and sometimes even in-store

TikTok is a powerful method of discovery across CPG products – beating out all other digital platforms.

And if your product release is in beauty or personal care, TikTok is the top driver of discovery – even more than in-store.

# Itʼs the message about your productʼs quality for me

More than price, todayʼs top motivator for buying a new CPG product is its quality – an attribute TikTok thrives at relaying to communities and potential buyers.

![](https://ads.tiktok.com/business/library/images/687b4c43a55978bfc06ba56a6ad329b7e42d6b815a265470300d6dcfeee26ab7.jpg)

# Take your launch from FYP to cart with a full funnel strategy

![](https://ads.tiktok.com/business/library/images/47eff533969758268945a97e8be20086be63ef214276c67389958c46ba5d7e4d.jpg)

Unlock your next product launch on TikTok by tapping into our suite of products with these complementary strategies:

![](https://ads.tiktok.com/business/library/images/c4db5e08d3ab5d70f06887fbbae9e6fd0fd98e85edbed65ac52fae4880685bda.jpg)

# 1\. Set your launch up for success with the right systems

Use Broad Targeting so our ad models can optimally find the right users to see your ad based on likeliness to convert. Then, use those learnings to retarget custom audiences.

+20 b "Fairly broad" audiences in TikTokAds Manager result +20% higher conversion rate in comparison to all other audiences1

Enable our system to better measure campaign effectiveness, and to learn from the actions that consumers take on your website with safe Data Connections.

+19 % Pixel + Events API campaigns saw +19% incremental events and +15% improvement on CPA 2

# 2\. Phasing your CPG launch product bundle

Advertisers who used this product bundle have observed a:

+6-8%

increase in awareness compared to TikTok Brand Lift Study norms7

![](https://ads.tiktok.com/business/library/images/4ea86fb9712673f2999e11659cd408e99940aef8ce60361358bae3412d5ab68b.jpg)

# 3\. Drive consumers towards consideration

# Drive product trial

Use Lead Generation to drive product trial. You can even offer exclusive TikTok-only offers or discounts to level up the hype!

Drive web traffic To direct more traffic to your retail website so people can learn more about your new product, tap our In Feed Ads optimized for web traffic.

# 4\. Take consumers from consideration to purchase

Spotlight your catalog for purchase Find purchase prospects and show off your product catalog to drive purchase on your retail site with Video Shopping Ads.

59 % Users agree VSA has interactive features that improve the shopping experience4

# Drive off-platform purchase

If you don't have a catalog, you can use In-Feed Ads with the web conversion objective to drive sales on your website or in-store.

1.9X TikTok's Retail ROAS for offline conversions is 1.9x more efficient than other media channels5

# Drive instant purchase on TikTok

Lean into the natural behavior of joyful discovery and intentional search. Set up a TikTok Shop for your new product launch and promote it organically with Shop Ads.

3 in 4 3 in 4 TikTok users say they are likely to buy from a brand theyʼve seen on TikTok Shop 6

# Activate community fandom for your launch on TikTok

Unlock community relationships, brand love, and revenue through authentic connections.

# New Launch

````````

![March Industry Chatter: TikTok Deal Pressure, Smarter Ad Safety, and Tariff Turbulence](https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/v2/D5612AQFgfoYyrfJFmQ/article-cover_image-shrink_720_1280/B56ZXTArHBGQAI-/0/1743001924544?e=2147483647&v=beta&t=n4iiEkHfCsoixQdP1pq4euNaRgr-myz76Mf3mSZbscQ)

Marketing never stops moving. Wpromote's monthly Marketing Industry Chatter newsletter will keep you up-to-date on the biggest headlines, updates, and trends in the wide world of marketing and media—with the expert insights you need to take action.

March Madness wasn’t limited to the basketball court this year—the marketing industry saw its own flurry of unexpected plays. From a potential TikTok deal that could upend social strategy to Scope3’s bold entry into the brand safety arena, the changes show no signs of slowing.

Add rising tariffs to the mix, and brands are juggling more than just bracket predictions; they’re navigating shifts that could impact everything from spend to supply chains. Whether you were tracking Cinderella stories or enjoying a well-earned spring break, we’ve got you covered with the top marketing stories you might’ve missed this month.

### Rising tariffs trigger supply chain disruptions and cost increases

What you need to know: The US has imposed tariffs on imports from China, Mexico, Canada, and several global industries, creating economic uncertainty and adding costs across supply chains. Businesses are preemptively raising prices in response to potential tariff impacts, leading to shifts in consumer confidence and spending behavior.

Analysts anticipate that marketing budgets may decline by late 2025, with media spend expected to be the most affected as companies adjust to economic conditions. Many companies are prioritizing digital and performance-driven marketing strategies to maintain flexibility and adapt to ongoing market fluctuations.

What you need to do: Tariffs are increasing costs across supply chains, leading to higher prices and lower consumer confidence. In times of volatility, it’s important to focus on efficiency while exploring strategies that offer greater adaptability. Monitor consumer behavior so you can adjust your messaging accordingly.

Find out more:

- Marketing Brew: [Tariffs and uncertainty to pull down ad spend, analyst predicts](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Emarketingbrew%2Ecom%2Fstories%2F2025%2F03%2F18%2Ftariffs-and-uncertainty-ad-spend-forecast-madison-and-wall&urlhash=ThYq&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)
- The Drum: [What do Trump's tariffs mean for marketing budgets?](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Ethedrum%2Ecom%2Fnews%2F2025%2F03%2F17%2Fwhat-do-trump-s-tariffs-mean-marketing-budgets&urlhash=fzsx&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)
- Wpromote: [Tariff Talk: How Will Trump's 2025 Tariffs Impact Consumer Behavior?](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Ewpromote%2Ecom%2Fblog%2Fdigital-marketing%2Ftrump-tariffs-2025&urlhash=QAW1&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)

### Scope3 takes on IAS and DoubleVerify with smarter brand protection

What you need to know: Scope3 recently launched Brand Standards, an AI-driven brand safety and suitability product that allows advertisers to create custom AI agents to assess brand suitability based on their values and goals. Built on Scope3’s Agentic Media Platform, Brand Standards is already integrated with Meta, Amazon DSP, Dotdash Meredith, and Index Exchange for smarter ad placement.

This product aims to reduce ad waste and carbon emissions while improving accountability and clearly explaining brand safety decisions. Brand Standards competes with DoubleVerify and Integral Ad Science (IAS) by evaluating content in real time and minimizing unnecessary blocking.

What you need to do:[Brand safety remains a critical concern for advertisers](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Ewpromote%2Ecom%2Fblog%2Fsocial%2Fbrand-safety%3Futm_source%3Dnewsletter%26utm_medium%3Dorganic%26utm_campaign%3Dbrand-safety&urlhash=yrg3&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block), as ads appearing in unsuitable environments can impact consumer trust and campaign performance. Integrated with platforms like Meta and Amazon DSP, Brand Standards provides more transparency in ad placement decisions and works to minimize unnecessary ad blocking. As digital advertising evolves, expect to see more customizable and accountable brand safety solutions.

Find out more:

- Marketing Brew: [Scope3 to take on brand-safety companies with new AI tech](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Emarketingbrew%2Ecom%2Fstories%2F2025%2F03%2F13%2Fscope3-to-take-on-brand-safety-companies-with-new-ai-tech&urlhash=sJ-Q&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)
- Adweek: [Scope3 Takes on IAS, DoubleVerify With Custom AI Agents for Brand Safety](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Eadweek%2Ecom%2Fprogrammatic%2Fscope3-ias-doubleverify-ai-agents-brand-safety%2F&urlhash=VXUv&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)

### TikTok deal deadline looms as White House weighs options

What you need to know: Oracle is reportedly closing in on a partnership deal to keep TikTok running in the US, leveraging its past ties with the app and the support of ByteDance, TikTok’s China-based owner.

The proposed deal may not fully comply with US legal requirements, which mandate eliminating Chinese influence over TikTok’s algorithm, data operations, and overall control of the platform.

[Lawmakers have raised concerns about whether working with ByteDance without full US ownership poses national security risks](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Ewpromote%2Ecom%2Fwhitepaper%2Ftiktok-bill%3Futm_source%3Dnewsletter%26utm_medium%3Dorganic%26utm_campaign%3Dtiktok-deal&urlhash=7LzF&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block), with discussions already taking place on Capitol Hill. The White House is pushing to finalize an agreement by April 5, but if Oracle’s deal does not meet legal standards, President Trump may choose to extend the deadline.

### Wonder goes all in on Tastemade to redefine food media

What you need to know: Food delivery disruptor Wonder is acquiring food media destination Tastemade for $90 million, gaining a content studio and advertising business.

The acquisition supports Wonder’s goal of creating a mealtime “super app” by integrating Tastemade’s content with its AI-powered platform, allowing users to seamlessly order meals directly from cooking videos.

Wonder plans to build a media network by combining Tastemade’s 160 million social followers with its first-party data, creating new advertising opportunities and increasing customer engagement. This is the latest in an ongoing trend as companies looking to grow seek to tie high-value content more closely with transactional touchpoints.

What you need to do: Consumers are seeking more meaningful interactions with brands, and Wonder’s acquisition of Tastemade reflects this shift. By integrating Tastemade’s content studio and social audience, Wonder is expanding its role in food media while creating additional advertising opportunities. Digital platforms are evolving to make content more interactive and actionable, so keep testing fresh ways to engage audiences and drive consumer interest.

### YouTube launches subscription tier for non-music users

What you need to know: YouTube launched a new $7.99/month "Premium Lite" subscription, offering ad-free videos across most content except music, targeting users who don't prioritize music streaming.

The plan caters to users already subscribed to other music streaming services, addressing a demand for a lower-cost, non-music-focused, ad-free experience.

Initially tested in Australia, Germany, and Thailand, Premium Lite attracted first-time subscribers, with many later upgrading to the full Premium plan. YouTube now has 125 million paying subscribers; ad revenue is still dominant, but subscriptions are becoming an increasingly significant contributor to Alphabet’s earnings.

What you need to do: YouTube’s Premium Lite suggests a shift in how audiences pay for and consume content; as consumers become more intentional, platforms are responding with tailored offerings. For advertisers, the popularity of this new service is a reminder to constantly reevaluate how audiences are interacting with media–[as user experiences change, your brand must adapt to new environments.](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Ewpromote%2Ecom%2Fblog%2Fdigital-marketing%2Fshopping-journey%3Futm_source%3Dnewsletter%26utm_medium%3Dorganic%26utm_campaign%3Dconsumer-behavior&urlhash=Cr4J&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block)
